title: hibbertia incana
intro: Hibbertia incana, also known as the grey guinea flower or woolly guinea flower, is a small shrub native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Hibbertia incana lie in its bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Hibbertia incana can be prepared for herbal use through infusion or decoction, with the dried leaves and flowers being steeped in hot water to create a tea or infusion.
